title: notoseris khasiana
intro: Notoseris khasiana, also known as Himalayan notoseris, is a rare and unique flowering plant species native to the Himalayan region. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Notoseris khasiana include its potential to treat various health issues such as fever, cough, and respiratory problems, as well as its ability to act as an antioxidant and antimicrobial agent. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, and is traditionally consumed as a tea or applied topically to the skin.
